scripts.dev: concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: node -e "const { spawn } = require('node:child_process'); const isWin = process.platform === 'win32'; const python = isWin ? '.venv\\\\Scripts\\\\python.exe' : './.venv/bin/python'; const child = spawn(python, ['-m', 'uvicorn', 'app.main:app', '--reload', '--port', '8000'], { cwd: 'backend', stdio: 'inherit', shell: isWin }); child.on('exit', (code) => process.exit(code ?? 1));"
